creator: chris@aims.com.au
text:
Howdy,

There's an updated patch to rdesktop. Included is a diff to the shell
archive I submitted. If the keyboard bindings don't work for people,
specifying -N on the rdesktop command line should fix it.
Doug, any chance of this being added?

--- rdesktop.shar.orig	Tue Apr  3 19:58:02 2001
+++ rdesktop.shar	Wed Apr  4 15:43:21 2001
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@
 XDIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
 X
 XPATCH_SITES=	http://bibl4.oru.se/projects/rdesktop/
-XPATCHFILES=	rdesktop-unified-patch19-5-7.bz2
+XPATCHFILES=	rdesktop-unified-patch19-5-8.bz2
 XPATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p2
 X
 XMAINTAINER=	mwest@uct.ac.za
@@ -53,7 +53,7 @@
 echo x - rdesktop/distinfo
 sed 's/^X//' >rdesktop/distinfo << 'END-of-rdesktop/distinfo'
 XMD5 (rdesktop/rdesktop-1.0.0.tar.bz2) = 2f45a57016fe7ee7930848bbcb94f8b7
-XMD5 (rdesktop/rdesktop-unified-patch19-5-7.bz2) =
f7c340a10c62c8d3fb825aa5f6fa
6ba4
+XMD5 (rdesktop/rdesktop-unified-patch19-5-8.bz2) =
7f9739571aa22f1896a362e5985f
cfa4
 END-of-rdesktop/distinfo
 echo x - rdesktop/pkg-comment
 sed 's/^X//' >rdesktop/pkg-comment << 'END-of-rdesktop/pkg-comment'

Regards,
Chris Knight
Systems Administrator
AIMS Independent Computer Professionals
Tel: +61 3 6334 6664  Fax: +61 3 6331 7032  Mob: +61 419 528 795
Web: http://www.aims.com.au
